title: [YTPMV] Bumper Crop Bonk
description:
UPDATE:  The Collab is officially closed!  Thanks to everyone who participated in making this sucessful!

I'm doing a Collab!
http://youchewpoop.com/forum/viewtopic.php?f=66&t=64138

Rules
-Make a YTPMV with any song from any Kirby game (except those listed below) and any video source
-You may not use Gourmet Race, Sky High / Candy Mountain, or Sand Canyon
-To join, simply make a video response to this video before July 4
